_comment: Baseline feature extractions for regression testing
_instructions: Do not edit manually. Regenerate with: uv run python scripts/generate_baseline.py

High Speed Chart.description: High BPM (210) with multiple difficulties, modern format

Complex BPM Changes.path: DDR A3/Continue to the real world/Continue to the real world.sm
Complex BPM Changes.description: Multiple BPM transitions (93-186) with stops/freezes and double charts

Extreme BPM Variations.description: 15 BPM changes ranging 80-160 BPM with 6 stops - most complex timing

Widest BPM Range.description: Extreme BPM range 106-424 BPM - stress test for BPM handling

Heavy Stops.description: 9 freeze points with BPM drop to 90 - stop/freeze handling

Extreme Low BPM.description: BPM drops to 40 - extreme low BPM handling

Steady High BPM with Stops.description: Stable 160 BPM with significant freeze durations

Simple Baseline.description: Simple chart with constant BPM, no timing gimmicks - baseline reference

Gallop Patterns.description: Clean gallop patterns (12th notes) with stable 178-180 BPM

Triplet Patterns.description: Clean triplet patterns (24th notes) at stable 175 BPM

Extreme Timing Chaos.description: 45 BPM changes + 44 stops - extreme timing complexity

Coordinated Timing.path: Jun's DDR 2014/[DDR Artists] - thosestairs/[DDR Artists] - thosestairs.sm
Coordinated Timing.description: 25 BPM changes (155/310) + 36 stops - coordinated timing patterns
